quote: The unexamined life is not worth living.
author: Socrates

quote: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
author: Will Durant

quote: Everything should be made as simple as possible, but no simpler.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: What we cannot speak about we must pass over in silence.
author: Ludwig Wittgenstein

quote: The map is not the territory.
author: Alfred Korzybski

quote: A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
author: Anonymous

quote: Perfection is achieved, not when there is nothing more to add, but when there is nothing left to take away.
author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quote: It is not enough to have a good mind; the main thing is to use it well.
author: René Descartes
